title: ED abdominal pain documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Lists specialist and emergency referral criteria for adult abdominal pain.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth abdominal-pain documentation; partial where the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter or telehealth restriction.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.

assessment.text: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.
assessment.rationale: The exact DHA adult abdominal-pain history section supports documenting onset, duration, severity, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician-assessed risk context for an adult emergency presentation; it does not diagnose the cause.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth abdominal-pain documentation; partial where the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter or telehealth restriction.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.

assessment.text: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.
assessment.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports recording time-critical symptoms or abnormal observations only when the clinician assessed them; it never asserts a red flag is absent.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth abdominal-pain documentation; partial where the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter or telehealth restriction.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.

assessment.text: Lists blood tests, urinalysis, pregnancy testing, pancreatic enzymes, and imaging selected according to the clinical assessment.
assessment.rationale: The exact investigation section supports recording test and imaging status only when already ordered, performed or reviewed by the clinician, without recommending testing.

assessment.text: Defines adult abdominal-pain use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.
assessment.rationale: The adult virtual-care scope was reviewed and limits transfer to an undifferentiated in-person ED presentation.
